__comment: PINNED example Grafana dashboard charting a BifrostQL metadata-marked business metric (sales_total) plus an engine self-metric. Documentation/example fixture only — the normal test suite never queries a live Grafana or Prometheus. Import into Grafana with a Prometheus data source that scrapes the BifrostQL /metrics endpoint (see prometheus-scrape-config.yml).
title: BifrostQL Overview

panels.title: Sales total (business metric)
panels.description: The sales_total series exported from the main.Sales table's metric-name metadata.

panels.title: Engine request rate by outcome
panels.description: bifrostql_engine_requests_total is the engine self-metric namespace, separate from business series.

panels.title: Scrape health
panels.description: bifrostql_prometheus_scrape_success is 1 when the metric collected on the last scrape.
